verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It matters so little how much you may own, The places you've been to and the people you've known, For it all comes to nothing when placed at His feet It's nothing to Jesus, just memories to keep.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You may take all the treasures from far away lands, And take all the riches you can hold in your hands, and take all the pleasures that riches can buy, But what will you have When it's your time to die?

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Only one life so soon it will pass. Only what's done for Christ will last. Only one chance to do His will, So give to Jesus all your days, It's the only life that pays, When you recall you have but one life.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The days pass so quickly, The months come and go. The years melt away like the new fallen snow, The spring turns to summer, Summer to fall. Autumn brings winter, Then death comes to call.
